title: OpenEMS Introduction
note: Documents OpenEMS as a modular open-source energy management platform for coordinating distributed energy assets.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository supporting the openness assessment for OpenEMS.

title: About OpenADR
note: Describes OpenADR as an open, interoperable, two-way information-exchange model and smart-grid standard for demand response and DER management.

title: OpenADR FAQ
note: Explains OpenADR's role in standardizing dynamic price and reliability signals for automated demand response.

title: OperatorFabric
note: Open-source grid-operations coordination project used as supporting evidence for interoperable energy coordination primitives.
